structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.LoggingCamp
structure.description: Logging Camps are [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [LOGGER:S] on [Forests|FOREST] and [Harvest|HARVEST] [TIMBER] from that Tile and all adjacent ones. A Logging Camp eventually depletes its [Tile's|TILE] available [TIMBER], and when this happens it shuts down and the [Forest|FOREST] is replaced with [BRUSH-LEAFY].[BLANK-LINE]Note that Logging Camps are less efficient than [WOOD-COLLECTOR:S] over the long-term, and are generally not ideal when you only have a few tiles of [Forest|FOREST] nearby.

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.Woodworks
structure.description: Woodworks are [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [LOGGER:S] on [Forests|FOREST] and [Harvest|HARVEST] [TIMBER] from that Tile and all adjacent ones.[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [LOGGING-CAMP-1] a Woodworks does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resources|RESOURCE] it Harvests. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.WheatFarm
structure.description: Wheat Farms are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [FARMER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [WHEAT], except during [Cold|COLD] months or when affected by [Weather|WEATHER].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.WheatFarm2
structure.description: Wheat Plantations are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [FARMER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [WHEAT], except during [Cold|COLD] months or when affected by [Weather|WEATHER].[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [WHEAT-FARM-1] this Structure does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resource Deposit|DEPOSIT] on its Tile. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.BarleyFarm
structure.description: Barley Farms are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [FARMER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [BARLEY], except when their [Tile|TILE] is [Cold|COLD] or affected by [Weather|WEATHER].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.BarleyFarm2
structure.description: Barley Plantations are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [FARMER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [BARLEY], except when their [Tile|TILE] is [Cold|COLD] or affected by [Weather|WEATHER].[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [BARLEY-FARM-1] this Structure does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resource Deposit|DEPOSIT] on its Tile. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.Orchard
structure.description: Orchards are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [FARMER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [FRUIT], except during [Cold|COLD] months or when affected by [Weather|WEATHER].[BLANK-LINE]Note that Orchards cannot be constructed on [DEPOSIT-BERRIES:S] (only [GATHERER:S] can [Harvest|HARVEST] them).

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.Orchard2
structure.description: Fruit Plantations are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [FARMER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [FRUIT], except during [Cold|COLD] months or when affected by [Weather|WEATHER].[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [FRUIT-FARM-1] this Structure does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resource Deposit|DEPOSIT] on its Tile. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].[BLANK-LINE]Note that Orchards cannot be constructed on [DEPOSIT-BERRIES:S] (only [GATHERER:S] can [Harvest|HARVEST] them).

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.Vineyard
structure.description: Vineyards are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [FARMER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [GRAPES], except when their [Tile|TILE] is [Cold|COLD] or affected by [Weather|WEATHER].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.Vineyard2
structure.description: Grape Plantations are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [FARMER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [GRAPES], except when their [Tile|TILE] is [Cold|COLD] or affected by [Weather|WEATHER].[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [VINEYARD-1] this Structure does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resource Deposit|DEPOSIT] on its Tile. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.OliveFarm
structure.description: Olive Farms are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [FARMER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [OLIVES], except when their [Tile|TILE] is [Cold|COLD] or affected by [Weather|WEATHER].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.OliveFarm2
structure.description: Olive Granges are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [FARMER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [OLIVES], except when their [Tile|TILE] is [Cold|COLD] or affected by [Weather|WEATHER].[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [OLIVE-FARM-1] this Structure does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resource Deposit|DEPOSIT] on its Tile. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.FlaxFarm
structure.description: Flax Farms are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [FARMER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [FLAX], except when their [Tile|TILE] is [Cold|COLD] or affected by [Weather|WEATHER].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.FlaxFarm2
structure.description: Flax Plantations are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [FARMER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [FLAX], except when their [Tile|TILE] is [Cold|COLD] or affected by [Weather|WEATHER].[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [FLAX-FARM-1] this Structure does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resource Deposit|DEPOSIT] on its Tile. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.Apiary
structure.description: Apiaries are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [FARMER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [HONEY], except when their [Tile|TILE] is [Cold|COLD] or affected by [Weather|WEATHER].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.Apiary2
structure.description: Honey Plantations are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [FARMER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [HONEY], except when their [Tile|TILE] is [Cold|COLD] or affected by [Weather|WEATHER].[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [APIARY-1] this Structure does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resource Deposit|DEPOSIT] on its Tile. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.CattlePasture
structure.description: Cattle Pastures are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [RANCHER:S] which add a [Tile's|TILE] Herd of [CATTLE] to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.CattlePasture2
structure.description: Cattle Ranches are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [RANCHER:S] which add a [Tile's|TILE] Herd of [CATTLE] to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE].[BLANK-LINE]Unlike Pastures, Ranches actually also increase the size of the herd over time. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.SheepPasture
structure.description: Sheep Pastures are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [RANCHER:S] which add a [Tile's|TILE] Herd of [SHEEP] to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.SheepPasture2
structure.description: Sheep Ranches are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [RANCHER:S] which add a [Tile's|TILE] Herd of [SHEEP] to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE].[BLANK-LINE]Unlike Pastures, Ranches actually also increase the size of the herd over time. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.PigPasture
structure.description: Pig Pastures are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [RANCHER:S] which add a [Tile's|TILE] Herd of [PIGS] to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.PigPasture2
structure.description: Pig Ranches are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [RANCHER:S] which add a [Tile's|TILE] Herd of [PIGS] to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE].[BLANK-LINE]Unlike Pastures, Ranches actually also increase the size of the herd over time. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.HorsePasture
structure.description: Horse Pastures are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [RANCHER:S] which add a [Tile's|TILE] Herd of [HORSES] to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.HorsePasture2
structure.description: Horse Ranches are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [RANCHER:S] which add a [Tile's|TILE] Herd of [HORSES] to your [Stockpile|STOCKPILE].[BLANK-LINE]Unlike Pastures, Ranches actually also increase the size of the herd over time. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.GoldMine
structure.description: Gold Mines are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [MINER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] huge amounts of [TREASURE], making them very valuable.

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.GoldMine2
structure.description: Gold Shaft Mines are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [MINER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] large amounts of [TREASURE], making them very valuable.[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [GOLD-MINE-1] this Structure does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resource Deposit|DEPOSIT] on its Tile. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.GemMine
structure.description: Gem Mines are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [MINER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] massive amounts of [TREASURE], making them extremely valuable.

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.GemMine2
structure.description: Gem Shaft Mines are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [MINER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] massive amounts of [TREASURE], making them extremely valuable.[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [GEM-MINE-1] this Structure does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resource Deposit|DEPOSIT] on its Tile. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.MeteoriteMine
structure.description: Meteorites are exceptionally rare! Mining them produces a truly massive amount of [IRON], but only for a short period of time. [Construct|CONSTRUCT] an [IRON-MINE-1] on them with a [MINER].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.IronMine
structure.description: Iron Mines are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [MINER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [IRON], which can be refined into [TOOLS], [WEAPONS], and a variety of other Resources necessary to [Train|TRAIN] and [Upgrade|UPGRADE] [Clans|CLAN] in [Warrior|WARRIOR] [Professions|PROFESSION].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.IronMine2
structure.description: Iron Shaft Mines are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [MINER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [IRON], which can be refined into [TOOLS], [WEAPONS], and a variety of other Resources necessary to [Train|TRAIN] and upgrade [Clans|CLAN] in [Warrior|WARRIOR] [Professions|PROFESSION].[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [IRON-MINE-1] this Structure does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resource Deposit|DEPOSIT] on its Tile. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.StoneQuarry
structure.description: Stone Quarries are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [MINER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [STONE], which is used to [Construct|CONSTRUCT] advanced [Structures|STRUCTURE] that Produce far more than their [TIMBER]-based counterparts.

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.StoneQuarry2
structure.description: Stone Shaft Quarries are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [MINER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [STONE], which is used to [Construct|CONSTRUCT] advanced [Structures|STRUCTURE] that Produce far more than their [TIMBER]-based counterparts.[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [STONE-QUARRY-1] this Structure does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resource Deposit|DEPOSIT] on its Tile. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.CoalMine
structure.description: Coal Mines are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [MINER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [COAL], which can be converted into [STEEL] along with [IRON] by a [STEELMAKER], or used in other misc ways (e.g. for the [BAKER]).

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.CoalMine2
structure.description: Coal Shaft Mines are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [MINER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [COAL], which can be converted into [STEEL] along with [IRON] by a [STEELMAKER], or used in other misc ways (e.g. for the [BAKER]).[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [COAL-MINE-1] this Structure does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resource Deposit|DEPOSIT] on its Tile. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.PeatMine
structure.description: Peat Mines are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [MINER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] a small amount of [COAL], which can be converted into [STEEL] along with [IRON] by a [STEELMAKER], or used in other misc ways (e.g. for the [BAKER]).

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.PeatMine2
structure.description: Peat Shaft Mines are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [MINER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] a small amount of [COAL], which can be converted into [STEEL] along with [IRON] by a [STEELMAKER], or used in other misc ways (e.g. for the [BAKER]).[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [PEAT-MINE-1] this Structure does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resource Deposit|DEPOSIT] on its Tile. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.SaltMine
structure.description: Salt Mines are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [MINER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [SALT], a valuable and flexible Resource that can be sold to the [Caravan|CARAVAN] or used to boost [FOOD] Production.

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.SaltMine2
structure.description: Salt Shaft Mines are a [Structure|STRUCTURE] [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [MINER:S] which [Harvest|HARVEST] [SALT], a valuable and flexible Resource that can be sold to the [Caravan|CARAVAN] or used to boost [FOOD] Production.[BLANK-LINE]Unlike the [SALT-MINE-1] this Structure does not [Degrade|DEGRADE] the [Resource Deposit|DEPOSIT] on its Tile. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.TradingPost
structure.description: Trading Posts [Produce|PRODUCE] [TREASURE]. They can only be [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [TRADER:S] on [Tiles|TILE] where two [Small Rivers|RIVER] meet or where a Small River empties into a large [Body of Water|WATER], and cannot be Constructed next to one another.

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.TradingPost2
structure.description: Trading Post Depots [Produce|PRODUCE] a massive amount of [TREASURE]. They can only be [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [TRADER:S] on [Tiles|TILE] where two [Small Rivers|RIVER] meet or where a Small River empties into a large [Body of Water|WATER], and cannot be Constructed next to one another. Structures built from [STONE-BLOCKS] can also be given [Apprentices|APPRENTICE] to greatly increase their [Production|PRODUCE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.SupplyDepot
structure.description: Supply Depots can extend your [Supply|SUPPLY] range beyond [Tiles|TILE] you [Control|CONTROL]. Each one increases the range by 4 [Tiles|TILE], and can be extended to any distance if 'chained' together.[NEWLINE]Supply Depots are essential if you expect to be campaigning far from home over the winter.

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.Watchtower
structure.description: Watchtowers extend your [Borders|BORDERS] by 3 [Tiles|TILE], and can [Produce|PRODUCE] [FAME] if assigned [Apprentices|APPRENTICE]. Unlike other [Structures|STRUCTURE] they can be [Constructed|CONSTRUCT] by [WATCHMAN:S] anywhere on the map, even outside of your existing [Borders|BORDERS].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.Fort
structure.description: Forts extend a Faction's [Control|CONTROL] by 2 [Tiles|TILE], double the [Defense|DEFENSE] of any [Warriors|WARRIOR] stationed there, and can [Produce|PRODUCE] [FAME] if assigned [Apprentices|APPRENTICE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.RomanFort
structure.description: Roman Forts extend a Faction's [Control|CONTROL] by 2 [Tiles|TILE], triple the [Defense|DEFENSE] of any [Warriors|WARRIOR] stationed there, and can [Produce|PRODUCE] [FAME] if assigned [Apprentices|APPRENTICE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.Settlement
structure.description: 定居点是迁徙部族的家园。定居点在[打包|PACKED]后可以在地图上[移动|MOVE-POINT]，并容纳可被[训练|TRAIN]为各类[职业|PROFESSION]的[氏族|CLAN]。

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.RomanCity
structure.description: One of the few remaining enclaves of Roman civilization.[NEWLINE]Capturing them is difficult, but doing so allows you to [Learn|LEARN] a [Profession|PROFESSION] of your choice for free! Roman Cities also produce a decent amount of [TREASURE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.BanditCamp
structure.description: Bandit Camps are home to [Bandits|BANDIT], vile raiders looking for blood, riches and glory.[NEWLINE]They will occasionally produce new [Warriors|WARRIOR] until [Pillaged|PILLAGE] and destroyed.

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.BanditFort
structure.description: Bandit Forts are the heavily armed headquarters of powerful [Bandit|BANDIT] raiding groups.[NEWLINE]They frequently produce new [Warriors|WARRIOR] until [Pillaged|PILLAGE] and destroyed. Be wary, should you find one nearby!

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.SlaveCamp
structure.description: Slave Camps are populated by large number of recently-escaped and highly aggressive slaves which now seek to terrorize the countryside.[NEWLINE]Slave [Warriors|WARRIOR] are weak individually, but usually appear in large numbers.

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.Monastery
structure.description: Monasteries are the secluded compounds of early Christianity's most pious men.[NEWLINE][Pillaging|PILLAGE] them provides significant amount of [TREASURE], but lowers your [FAME] and hurts relations with other Christian leaders.

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.AncientShrine
structure.description: Ancient Shrines are places for contemplation and worship established by distant ancestors.[NEWLINE]Its inspirational qualities allow adjacent [Clans|CLAN] recover all lost [Morale|MORALE] in a single turn. [Pillaging|PILLAGE] them provides [TIMBER], but hurts your [FAME]

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.DestroyedBridge
structure.description: Destroyed Bridges are all that remains of a once-mighty feat of Roman engineering.[NEWLINE][Pillaging|PILLAGE] them provides a small amount of [STONE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.PillagedBridge
structure.description: Destroyed Bridges are all that remains of a once-mighty feat of Roman engineering.[NEWLINE][Pillaging|PILLAGE] them normally provides a small amount of [STONE], but this one has already been stripped of anything useful.

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.RomanDam
structure.description: Roman Dams are incredible feats of engineering designed to create artificial lakes for irrigation.[NEWLINE][Pillaging|PILLAGE] them provides a large amount of [STONE].

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.PillagedRomanDam
structure.description: Roman Dams are incredible feats of engineering designed to create artificial lakes for irrigation.[NEWLINE][Pillaging|PILLAGE] them normally provides a large amount of [STONE], but this one has already been stripped of anything useful.

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.BurningWreckage
structure.description: The still-burning remains of a recently-destroyed [Structure|STRUCTURE]

structure.name: TEXT.Name.Structure.Wreckage
structure.description: The destroyed remains of a once-useful [Structure|STRUCTURE]
